topics.topic_title: Probiotics for prevention of antibiotic-associated diarrhoea

cochrane_truth.note: Goldenberg JZ et al., Probiotics for the prevention of antibiotic-associated diarrhea.

topics.pubmed_query: (probiotics) AND (antibiotic-associated diarrhea) AND (prevention) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.topic_title: Vitamin E supplementation for cardiovascular events

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: no benefit; possible harm at high doses
cochrane_truth.note: Vivekananthan DP et al; Cochrane antioxidant vitamins reviews.

topics.pubmed_query: (Vitamin E supplementation) AND (cardiovascular events OR cardiovascular mortality) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: small inconsistent benefit; varies by dose, EPA vs DHA, population
cochrane_truth.note: Appleton KM et al, Omega-3 fatty acids for depression in adults.

topics.pubmed_query: (omega-3 OR EPA OR DHA) AND (depression OR depressive disorder) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.topic_title: Magnesium sulfate for prevention of eclampsia

cochrane_truth.note: Duley L et al (Magpie trial group).

topics.pubmed_query: (magnesium sulfate) AND (pre-eclampsia OR preeclampsia) AND (eclampsia prevention) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: restrictive better; less perineal trauma, less suturing
cochrane_truth.note: Jiang H et al, Selective versus routine use of episiotomy for vaginal birth.

topics.pubmed_query: (episiotomy) AND (vaginal birth OR vaginal delivery) AND (perineal trauma) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.topic_title: Routine continuous electronic fetal monitoring in low-risk labour
topics.O: neonatal outcomes (perinatal mortality, cerebral palsy, caesarean rate)

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: no reduction in perinatal mortality or cerebral palsy; increases caesarean and instrumental delivery
cochrane_truth.note: Alfirevic Z et al, Continuous cardiotocography (CTG) for fetal assessment during labour.

topics.pubmed_query: (continuous electronic fetal monitoring OR cardiotocography) AND (low-risk labour OR low-risk labor) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

cochrane_truth.note: Sauerland S et al, Laparoscopic versus open surgery for suspected appendicitis.

topics.pubmed_query: (laparoscopic appendectomy) AND (open appendectomy) AND (wound infection) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.topic_title: Routine antibiotic prophylaxis at dental visits in healthy adults
topics.P: healthy adults without high-risk cardiac conditions
topics.I: routine antibiotic prophylaxis before dental procedures

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: not recommended for low-risk patients; harms outweigh benefits
cochrane_truth.note: Glenny AM et al; AHA 2007+ guideline updates.

topics.pubmed_query: (antibiotic prophylaxis) AND (dental procedures) AND (infective endocarditis) AND (healthy OR low-risk) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: no benefit over sham (Moseley 2002 NEJM); subsequent reviews concur
cochrane_truth.note: Brignardello-Petersen R et al (BMJ Rapid Recommendation 2017); Cochrane orthopaedic reviews.

topics.pubmed_query: (arthroscopic surgery) AND (knee osteoarthritis) AND (sham OR placebo OR conservative) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.topic_title: Antibiotics for acute otitis media in children

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: RR ~0.7 at 2-7d; NNT ~20; small benefit at 2-7d, no benefit at 24h
cochrane_truth.note: Venekamp RP et al; nuanced consensus.

topics.pubmed_query: (antibiotics) AND (acute otitis media) AND (children) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.P: children with acute cough or cold symptoms

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: no evidence of benefit; FDA contraindication under 12 due to respiratory depression
cochrane_truth.note: Smith SM et al, OTC medications for acute cough; FDA Drug Safety Communication 20 April 2017.

topics.pubmed_query: (codeine) AND (cough) AND (children OR pediatric) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)

topics.topic_title: High-flow nasal cannula vs standard oxygen for bronchiolitis
topics.O: escalation of care or length of stay

cochrane_truth.effect_estimate_approx: mixed; PARIS trial reduced escalation but no LOS benefit; other trials null
cochrane_truth.note: Lin J et al, High-flow nasal cannula for children with bronchiolitis (Cochrane updated).

topics.pubmed_query: (high-flow nasal cannula OR HFNC) AND (bronchiolitis) AND (randomized controlled trial OR systematic review)
